title: Delay switch
abstract:
PURPOSE: To lower the cost and also to make load ON-operation light so as to eliminate any feeling of disorder by using a shape-memory resin for delay operation.
CONSTITUTION: Under the condition that a switch handle 4 is in OFF operation, a shape-memory resin 1 is heated by a heater 5. When the handle 4 is turned ON, a movable contactor 8 starts ON operation at the pushing part 9 and consequently, electric power is supplied to load 7 and at the same time an external pressure is applied to the heated resin 1 so that this resin may be deformed. Further a heater switch part 6 becomes OFF state so that the heater 5 is ceased and the resin keeps its deformed shape. Then, when the handle 4 is turned OFF, the pushing part 9 is separated from the contactor 8 but the resin 1 keeps the deformed state and the contactor 8 is kept in ON operation state and electric power is continuously supplied to the load 7. Moreover, since the switch part 6 becomes ON, the resin recovers its original shape after a time passes and the contactor 8 is turned OFF. As a result, the electric power to the load 7 is stopped after a prescribed time.
description: [0001]"Technical field" In this invention, lamp, electric power is supplied to the on-load such as a fan, is shut off after an operation delay time of the delay after the switch is associated. [0002]"Conventional" As this kind of conventional delay switch, or semiconductor circuit is used, the spring is wound during operation of the spring return force in turning on or off the switch is open. [0003]"The invention is to solve the problem of" However, the semiconductor circuit is used, the control section of the circuit requires the use of a rectifier such as CT, the on, off or with triac for heating, the heat required for suppressing the cooling fins, and the cost is high since the shape becomes large drawback. [0004]One of the spiral spring is used, the time required for winding up a spring force for turning on, turning on heavy feeling, which has incompatibility problems. [0005]Thus, the purpose of this invention is, in no sense of incongruity on lightening delay switch. [0006]"Means for solving the problem" The delay switch of this invention, heated to a prescribed temperature by applying pressure while heating retains its shape after deformation is stopped, the shape memory resin is re-heated to a predetermined temperature by returning to its original shape, the shape memory resin is connected to the movable contact of the main switch is turned on applying external pressure and having shape memory resin, said movable contact on said movable contact to operation by said on-press, which press the movable contact separates from the switch handle has turned off, the shape memory resin is heated to a predetermined temperature in the heater, the heater having a heater on and off switch, wherein the switch portion is a heater, the switch is turned on and off operation of the switch handle so that the handle of the broken into interlocking and, wherein the shape of the shape memory resin of the resetting action of the movable contact is in the on-off operation. [0007]"Action" In this configuration, the handle is operated to turn off the switch state, the switch part is turned on for the heater, the shape memory resin is heated to a predetermined temperature by the heater. The switch handle is turned on by the pressing part and the movable contact is turned on, power is supplied to the shape memory resin is heated by this load pressure is applied to the shape memory resin is deformed, and the heater switch is turned off so that the heater is stopped by turning on a switch handle, a shape memory resin is cooled to hold deformation begins. Then the movable contact is away from the pressing part and the switch handle turns off, the shape memory resin is cooled state is maintained because of the deformation, the deformation of the shape memory resin for holding the movable contact is continuously maintained turned on state, the power is continuously supplied to the load. By turning off the heater so that the switch part is turned on, the shape memory resin is re-heated by the heater receives, at a predetermined temperature of said shape memory resin returns to the original shape until the time has elapsed, the return movement of the movable contact is in the shape of the on-off operation. As a result, the load current is stopped after a certain time after the off operation of the switch handle becomes. [0008]In this manner, shape memory resin is used and delay action, the shape memory resin is low cost and can be easily molded, and the delay switch can be simplified. The shape memory resin is heated by a heater is operated on the softening point, the load becomes lighter and the uncomfortable feeling on operation.
